---
title: "RTMB/corHMM comparisons on rayfinned fish data"
author: "Haoyu Ji"
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
date: today
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(here)
```

```{r pkgs}
library(Matrix)
library(ape)
library(tidyverse); theme_set(theme_bw())
library(expm)
library(RTMB)
library(colorspace)

source(here::here("R", "postAD.R"))
source(here::here("R", "gen2.R"))
source(here::here("R", "post2.R"))
```

```{r datareveal}
c_tree <- readRDS(here::here("data", "c_tree.rds"))
c_traits <- readRDS(here::here("data", "c_traits.rds"))
```

```{r fit0}
fit_formula <- postAD(tree = c_tree, traitMatrix = c_traits, formula_list = list(ag ~ care * spawning, care ~ 1, spawning ~ 1))
```

```{r}
## debug(postMCMC_tmbstan)
m2 <- postMCMC_tmbstan(
  tree = c_tree,
  traitMatrix = c_traits,
  formula_list = list(
    ag ~ pc * sc,
    pc ~ 1,
    sc ~ 1
  ),
  state = 2,
  iter_warmup = 100,
  iter_sampling = 500,
  chains = 2,
  gainloss = 0,
  seed = 427
)

print(m2$fit)

data.frame(
  index = seq_along(m2$par_names),
  par_name = m2$par_names
)

saveRDS(m2, file = "postMCMC_tmbstan.rds")
```
